title: chamaecytisus austriacus subsp. austriacus
intro: Chamaecytisus austriacus subsp. austriacus, commonly known as the Austrian broom or Austrian shrub, is a perennial legume native to central and eastern Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Chamaecytisus austriacus subsp. austriacus include its ability to support cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and improve digestion. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including gastrointestinal disorders and respiratory issues.
